banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock founder: Elin Bergström, a Swedish resident incorporating a brand-new single-founder aktiebolag, 'Bergström IT-konsult AB', an IT-consultancy business seated in Gothenburg. Elin is the company's sole founder and sole ordinary board member, paying up the minimum SEK 25,000 share capital in cash for 2,500 shares, with a Sweden-resident deputy board member (Oskar Lindqvist) as the Companies Act requires whenever the board has fewer than three ordinary members. Signatory power is alternative 1 (the board — Elin — signs on behalf of the company). All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

collectedValues.label: First name and surname of the contact person for this case
Does the contact person have a Bolagsverket deposit account to pay the registration fee from?
Company's share capital, paid in full in cash (SEK)
Founder's personal identity number, or company registration number if the founder is a legal entity
Does the founder live outside Sweden (not in the Swedish population register)?
Board member's personal identity number (date of birth, if resident abroad)
Does the board member live outside Sweden (not in the Swedish population register)?
Deputy board member's personal identity number (date of birth, if resident abroad)
Does the deputy board member live outside Sweden (not in the Swedish population register)?
Deputy board member's all first names
Signatory power (who is entitled to sign on behalf of the company)

notApplicableFields.reason: contactHasDepositAccount is false — requiredWhen condition false
optional field: two proposals were considered enough backup in this scenario
founderResidesAbroad is false — requiredWhen condition false
boardMemberResidesAbroad is false — requiredWhen condition false
deputyBoardMemberResidesAbroad is false — requiredWhen condition false
signatoryPowerType is board_signs_jointly, not other_specified_below — requiredWhen condition false

documents.note: Mock: stiftelseurkund signed by Elin Bergström as sole founder
Mock: bolagsordning adopted by the founder
Mock: certificate from a Gothenburg branch of a Swedish bank confirming SEK 25,000 paid in
Mock: included within the memorandum of association
Mock: declaration accepted as stated on the form
Mock: signed in blue ink by Elin Bergström, dated 2026-07-15

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's effective visibility/requiredness from the schema's own requiredWhen members (a GSP-0013 condition evaluator), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields for exact 1:1 coverage of all fields in schema.fields.
